name: Solana Developers
fullText:
📣 Anchor patch 1.0.1 is out

This patch fixes a bug in the `AnchorSerialize` and `AnchorDeserialize` derive macros.

Update the dependency via:
cargo update anchor-derive-serde

Or the entire Anchor toolset with: 
avm install 1.0.1

https://t.co/T8rGHFYIww
